parents.subject: LU-18135 scripts: bad iproute rt_tables path

commit.subject: LU-15639 tests: fix facets_hosts() to get active hosts
commit.message:
LU-15639 tests: fix facets_hosts() to get active hosts

This patch fixes facets_hosts() to get active hosts under
failover configuration.

Lustre-change: https://review.whamcloud.com/61409
Lustre-commit: 055945b29e696485974d98e26c721913b515ce67

Test-Parameters: trivial mdtcount=4 mdscount=2 \
  testlist=sanity,conf-sanity,replay-single,replay-dual,recovery-small

Test-Parameters: trivial env=FAILURE_MODE=HARD \
  clientcount=4 mdtcount=1 mdscount=2 osscount=2 \
  austeroptions=-R failover=true iscsi=1 \
  testlist=replay-dual,replay-single,recovery-small

Change-Id: Ia209cb5e5fad4150e14bd9739c7f3552a0a17e43
Signed-off-by: Jian Yu <yujian@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Emoly Liu <emoly@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Frederick Dilger <fdilger@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/62413
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
